seeed_as5600_init.tooltip: Initialize the Grove/Seeed AS5600 12-bit magnetic absolute encoder

seeed_as5600_get_address.tooltip: Get the fixed AS5600 I2C address, usually 0x36

seeed_as5600_read_angle.tooltip: Read raw or scaled angle data as 0-4095 raw units or converted degrees

seeed_as5600_detect_magnet.tooltip: Check whether the AS5600 detects a magnet

seeed_as5600_magnet_status.tooltip: Check magnet strength state: 0 none, 1 weak, 2 good, 3 strong

seeed_as5600_get_magnet_strength.tooltip: Read magnet strength state: 0 none, 1 weak, 2 good, 3 strong

seeed_as5600_get_magnitude.tooltip: Read the AS5600 internal CORDIC magnetic magnitude

seeed_as5600_get_agc.tooltip: Read the AS5600 automatic gain control register value

seeed_as5600_set_position_current.tooltip: Use the current magnet position as the start position, end position, or max angle

seeed_as5600_set_position.tooltip: Set the start position, end position, or max angle register, usually 0-4095

seeed_as5600_get_position.tooltip: Read the raw start position, end position, or max angle register value

seeed_as5600_set_output_mode.tooltip: Set the AS5600 OUT pin output mode

seeed_as5600_get_conf.tooltip: Read the raw AS5600 CONF configuration register value

seeed_as5600_set_conf.tooltip: Write the raw AS5600 CONF configuration register value

seeed_as5600_get_burn_count.tooltip: Read the ZMCO burn count. Start/end positions can be burned up to 3 times

seeed_as5600_burn_angle.message0: encoder %1 burn start/end angle and return status code
seeed_as5600_burn_angle.tooltip: Permanently burn start/end positions to the chip. Returns 1 for success and negative error codes. Use is limited

seeed_as5600_burn_settings.message0: encoder %1 burn max angle and config and return status code
seeed_as5600_burn_settings.tooltip: Permanently burn max angle and configuration to the chip. This can be done once only. Returns 1 for success and negative error codes
